filters.q: from:airwallex.com (subject:"payment received" OR subject:"funds received" OR subject:"transfer received" OR subject:"deposit") -shopify newer_than:2d

parameters.text: ={{ '✅ Payment check complete — ' + $json.date + ' — no new client payments detected.' }}

={{ '✅ *Payment Received — ' + $('Match Deposits To Invoices').item.json.clientName + '*
• Invoice: ' + $('Match Deposits To Invoices').item.json.invoiceNumber + '
• Amount: ' + $('Match Deposits To Invoices').item.json.amount + ' ' + $('Match Deposits To Invoices').item.json.currency + '
• Confirmed: ' + $('Match Deposits To Invoices').item.json.paymentDate + '
• Tracker: Updated to Payment Complete' }}
